lines.hearsay: There was a low conversation at {place} that stopped whenever anyone came near.
lines.gossip: {A} wrote {B} onto a haulage docket at {place} and never once looked up while {B} explained why {B} needed it — {A} charges the ones who can pay, and did not mention a fee.
lines.report: {A} engrossed a day-labour docket for {B} ({B} purse low) at {place}, slot {slot}.
